explanation_en: The phrase you're killing me is an exaggerated way of saying that something or someone is very funny.
example_en: This idiomatic expression means that the person you are talking to is so funny that one could die from laughing.

translations.Urdu: بہت زیادہ الجھن میں رہنا / بہت زیادہ ہن ہنسانا

explanation_en: To be young at heart means to have a youthful spirit in spite of being old.
example_en: Although he is over 80, he still feels young at heart.

explanation_en: the time when something is planned to begin (military)
example_en: "This is the zero hour for the attack," said the sergeant.

translations.Urdu: حملے کا صیحح وقت / وہ وقت جب فوجی کاروائی شروع کی جائے ۔ فوجی کاروائی کا مقررہ وقت
